overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character riding a horse through a dark forest at night, illuminated by a handheld lantern. The rider is accompanied by a walking companion initially, then crosses a shallow river and continues along a rocky shoreline.

agents.ego_description: riding horse at walking pace through dense forest, holding lantern to illuminate the path ahead

notable_agents.action: companion walking alongside the horse on the left side of the path

entered.detail: Dense forest of tall pine trees surrounding the path on all sides
Narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
Grass and bushes lining both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a character riding a horse through a densely forested area at night, illuminated only by a handheld lantern. A companion walks alongside on the left, keeping pace with the horse. Tall pine trees create a canopy overhead, mostly blocking the sky, while the narrow dirt path winds through the undergrowth.

events.description: forest opens up revealing rocky outcrops and distant mountains against the night sky
terrain becomes rockier as the path approaches the river

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the forest thins out, approaching the river

notable_agents.action: companion walking ahead on the left side, leading toward the river

entered.detail: Large rock formations and boulders visible through the thinning trees
Distant mountain range visible against the dark night sky

segments.scene_description: As the horse continues forward, the dense forest gives way to a more open area with scattered trees. Rocky outcrops become visible on the right, and distant mountains appear on the horizon. The companion remains on the left, walking ahead as the path becomes increasingly rocky while approaching a river.

events.description: horse steps into shallow river water, creating splashes
horse slows pace while carefully navigating through the flowing water

agents.ego_description: carefully guiding horse through the shallow river, water splashing around the hooves

entered.detail: Shallow flowing river water reflecting the warm lantern light
Steep rocky canyon walls rising on both sides of the river
Clear night sky with visible stars above the canyon opening

segments.scene_description: The horse enters a shallow river, with water splashing around its hooves as the lantern light reflects off the rippling surface. The companion is no longer visible. The scene opens into a wide river canyon with steep rocky walls on either side, and a starry sky is visible overhead.

events.description: horse climbs out of the water onto the rocky riverbank

agents.ego_description: riding horse up the bank and continuing along the rocky shoreline

entered.detail: Gravel and pebble beach along the riverbank
Large rocks and stones scattered across the shore

segments.scene_description: The horse climbs out of the river onto a rocky gravel shore and continues along the riverbank. The terrain is uneven with scattered boulders, and the canyon walls are now much closer on the left side. The path continues along the water's edge into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic night forest that gradually opens into a wide, starry river canyon. It begins on a narrow dirt path under a dense canopy of pine trees, where a handheld lantern illuminates a rider on horseback and a companion walking alongside. As the horse moves forward, the forest thins into an open area with rocky outcrops and distant mountains appearing on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the horse enters a shallow river, with the lantern light reflecting off the rippling water while the surroundings expand into a vast canyon under a clear, starry sky. Finally, the camera follows the horse as it climbs onto a gravel shore, navigating uneven boulders along the water's edge beneath towering rocky walls.
